preservation_contract: Promote only a tracked official-source snapshot with sufficient provenance to preserve its exact body and source URL. RuleSpec summaries/excerpts and unprovenanced encoder caches are not source snapshots.

rulespec_source_audit.git_object_search: git ls-tree -r --name-only at the pinned RuleSpec commit
